title: Updating Our Targa Resources Valuation After Its Lucid Energy Acquisition
text: TRGP recently acquired Lucid Energy Delaware for $3.55 billion. The deal adds gathering and processing assets and will increase throughput in its downstream assets.

title: Targa (TRGP) to Buy Lucid Energy in a $3.55B Transaction
text: Targa Resources (TRGP) looks to expand its Permian Basin footprint with the $3.55-billion acquisition of Lucid Energy.

title: Targa Resources: Back In The Buy Zone
text: Over the past year, Targa Resources has improved its balance sheet and grown distributable cash flow. Strong commodity prices have goosed its returns.
